parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as duplicate_count, '{{ $json.hash }}' as hash, '{{ $json.title }}' as title, '{{ $json.url }}' as url, '{{ $json.sourceType }}' as source_type, '{{ $json.sourceName }}' as source_name, '{{ $json.description }}' as description FROM pipeline_memory WHERE hash = '{{ $json.hash }}'

options.systemMessage:
You are a ghostwriter for a senior enterprise AI practitioner. Follow the Brand DNA rules exactly. No preamble, no explanation, no markdown, no quotation marks.
Return a raw JSON object containing exactly two keys: "postText" and "visualPrompt". 

"postText": Follow the copy instructions exactly. 
"visualPrompt": Create a hyper-specific, minimalist 1:1 image prompt for a data visualization stat card based on the copy. Focus on dark mode aesthetics, clean geometry, no people, and a single, striking keyword or data metric.

parameters.text: 📋 New post ready for approval. Check Gmail for details and approve/reject buttons.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO pipeline_memory (hash, title, url, source_name, source_type, date_fetched, status, post_text, image_url)
VALUES ('{{ $json.hash }}', '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.url }}', '{{ $json.sourceName }}', '{{ $json.sourceType }}', NOW(), 'pending_approval', '{{ $json.postText.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.imageUrl }}')
ON CONFLICT (hash) DO UPDATE 
SET post_text = EXCLUDED.post_text, image_url = EXCLUDED.image_url;

parameters.text: Success! The approved post is now live on LinkedIn.
